lightsail.distribution.inputorigin.Name.Description: The name of the origin resource.

lightsail.distribution.inputorigin.Proto.Description: The protocol that your Amazon Lightsail distribution uses when establishing a connection with your origin to pull content.

lightsail.distribution.inputorigin.Regio.Description: The AWS Region name of the origin resource.
lightsail.distribution.inputorigin.Regio.Allowed values: ap-northeast-1 | ap-northeast-2 | ap-south-1 | ap-southeast-1 | ap-southeast-2 | ca-central-1 | eu-central-1 | eu-north-1 | eu-west-1 | eu-west-2 | eu-west-3 | us-east-1 | us-east-2 | us-west-1 | us-west-2
